vocab.meaning: cảnh quan đẹp đến ngạt thở
vocab.example: I can never resist snapping a few shots when I'm confronted with a breathtaking vista from a mountain top.

vocab.meaning: giờ vàng (khoảnh khắc ngay sau khi mặt trời mọc hoặc trước khi mặt trời lặn)
vocab.example: I always try to time my photography during the golden hour to get that soft, ethereal glow on the landscape.

vocab.meaning: vẻ rực rỡ/huy hoàng của thiên nhiên
vocab.example: Photography is my way of paying homage to the natural splendor that we often take for granted.
I love capturing the striking contrast between the jagged dark rocks and the turquoise blue of the ocean.

vocab.meaning: tường thuật bằng hình ảnh (kể chuyện qua ảnh)
vocab.example: For me, taking scenery pictures is about creating a visual narrative of my journey through different terrains.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
vocab.example: It is increasingly rare to find truly unspoilt scenery, so I always document it when I have the chance.

vocab.meaning: khiếu nghệ thuật/phong cách nghệ thuật
vocab.example: I like to add a bit of artistic flair to my shots by playing with long exposure to make waterfalls look silky.
Autumn is the best season for photography because of the vivid hues of red and gold that blanket the forests.

vocab.meaning: lưu giữ khoảnh khắc vĩnh cửu
vocab.example: Taking a photo is the only way to immortalize the moment when the light hits the valley perfectly.

vocab.meaning: thảm xanh trải dài bao la
vocab.example: The drone allowed me to capture the sweeping greenery of the tea plantations from an entirely new perspective.
